packageSummary:
**Summary:** The 'South African Dhamaka' package is a 7-day tour that takes you through the beautiful cities of Cape Town and Johannesburg in South Africa. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Table Mountain, Cape Point, and Boulders Beach, as well as a wine tasting experience and a tour of the Cango Caves and Ostrich Farm. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a Seal Island Boat Cruise and a Danube river cruise.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Cape Town, Meals: Dinner
- Fly to Cape Town and check-in at the hotel.
- Welcome to South Africa and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2:** Cape Town, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
- City tour of Cape Town - Cable Car ride to Table Mountain – Optional Experience Helicopter ride
- Visit Victoria and the Alfred waterfront, enroute drive past Green Market square, District Six, Company Gardens, and Houses of the Parliament, the City Hall, the Castle and Slave Lodge.

**Day 3:** Cape Town, Meals: Breakfast & Dinner
- Day free for leisure on own
- You can opt for optional full day Cape Peninsula Tour.

**Day 4:** Mossel Bay, Meals: Breakfast, Local Lunch and Dinner
- On to Garden Route
- Check-out and start your journey to Garden Route. Enroute we will do a Wine tasting with local lunch. Later proceed towards Mosselbay.

**Day 5:** Mossel Bay, Meals: Breakfast & Dinner
- Today visit Oudtshoorn – ‘The Feather Capital of the World’. Visit the Cango Caves, Ostrich Farm.
- Proceed to Oudtshoorn. Visit Cango caves. Proceed to the Ostrich Farm. Visit Ostrich farm. Visit the Cango Wildlife Ranch.

**Day 6:** Johannesburg, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Fly to Johannesburg
- Arrive and transfer to your hotel for check-in.

**Day 7:** Johannesburg, Meals: Breakfast
- Tour Ends.
- Proceed to airport. Fly Back.

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare & internal flights as per the itinerary
- Accommodations at the hotels specified above or similar
- All local taxes including services taxes as of 1st Jan, 2024
- Cost of Visa & Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour
- Sightseeing, accommodation & services as per the above-mentioned itinerary
- All transfers and excursions inclusive of entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned van/coach
- Professional services of a friendly and multilingual Tour Manager (Subject to minimum 30 customers) or a local Representative.

**Exclusions:**

- If you wish to travel in advance i.e. before the published departure date as mentioned in the brochure or like to come back on a later date after the tour ends, there will be an additional charge that will be applicable (subject to availability of seats for the given dates & ticket validity) which will be advised to you by our sales staff / travel agent.
- Mandatory Tipping for Ontour Services (Coach Driver, Local Guides etc).
- Any increase in the airfare charged by the airline on your air ticket (presently calculated as of 1st Jan 2024)
- PCR test in India & South Africa
- Applicable Government Taxes and other service charges
- GST & TCS
- The tour cost does not include POE charges and passport charges
- Compulsory tips
- Porterage Facility
- Any other expenses of personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, mini-bar, mineral water, telephone charges, foods and beverages that are not included as a part of the package
- Additional Meals which is not specifically included in the above itinerary
- Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees and local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in the above itinerary
- Cost of Optional Excursions.

**Summary:** The 'Marvellous Ladakh' package is a 7-day journey that takes you through the breathtaking landscapes and stunning natural beauty of Ladakh, India. This tour covers the iconic Hemis Gompa, Thiksey Monastery, Shey Palace, and Sindhu Ghat, as well as the majestic Pangong Lake and Nubra Valley. With its 360-degree scenic views, fascinating high altitude, and unique multi-color reflections, this tour promises to be an unforgettable experience for all travelers.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival at Leh
- Arrival at Leh Airport and meet, greet, assist, and transfer to the hotel.
- Take a walk to the local bazaar in Leh for leisure and acclimatization.

**Day 2:** Leh Sightseeing
- Visit Hall of Fame, Spituk Monastery, and Kali Mata Temple, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Patthar Sahib, and Confluence of Zanskar - Indus rivers.
- Return to Leh for lunch and overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 3:** Leh - Nubra Via Khardungla Pass
- Drive to Nubra Valley via the World Highest Motorable road (5602 Mts) Khardungla pass.
- Visit White Sand Dunes at Hunder and enjoy a camel ride (on own).
- Visit Hunder Sand Dunes and Diskit monastery and check in at Deluxe Camp.

**Day 4:** Nubra - Pangong Lake
- Drive to Pangong Lake (14,500 ft.) enroute visit Shyok River & Durbuk Village.
- Enjoy the beauty of the lake on the Banks of Pangong Lake with multi-color reflections and the fascinating high altitude of the lake.

**Day 5:** Pangong - Leh
- Drive around the Pangong Lake and don't forget to click photos!!
- Drive to Leh through the Changla Pass 17,350 ft is the third highest motor-able road in the world.

**Day 6:** Leh Excursion To Monasteries
- Visit Hemis Gompa, the largest monastic foundation of Drukpa Kagyu Order of Tibetan Buddhism, Thiksey Monastery, Shey Palace, and Sindhu Ghat.
- Return to Leh for lunch and overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 7:** Departure
- Depart from Leh airport to board your flight back home.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in Standard Room category at each place.
- 06 breakfasts and 06 dinners.
- Transportation by NAC Xylo / Scorpio / Innova (1 to 6 pax) & Non Ac Tempo Trv (7 to 12 pax) (as per availability) for arrival / departure transfers, sightseeing as per the itinerary.
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing.
- Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while traveling to Nubra/ Pangong only.
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs).
- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates.

**Exclusions:**

- Airfares trainfare.
- Any monastery entrance fees, Any Joy ride or rafting.
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind.
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature.
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charges extra.
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses.
- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section.

**Supplement for English Speaking Local Guide (optional):** Rs. 3000.00 per day.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - Scotland From London' package is a 10-day tour that takes you through the beautiful cities of London, Durham, Edinburgh, Inverness, and Glasgow in the UK. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Tower of London, Buckingham Palace, Edinburgh Castle, Loch Ness, and more. You will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a sightseeing tour of London, a visit to the Stirling Castle, and a boat tour on Loch Ness. The tour also includes transfers and excursions, as well as accommodations at the hotels specified above or similar. This is a fantastic opportunity to experience the culture, history, and natural beauty of Scotland and England.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** London, Meals: N/A
- Welcome to Europamundo!
- Transfer to the hotel and check-in.

**Day 2:** London, Meals: Breakfast
- Get to know LONDON on a locally guided tour featuring style, culture, and history.
- See the Houses of Parliament, the River Thames, the Tower of London, and Buckingham Palace.
- Watch the famous “Changing of the Guard” (depending on the season).

**Day 3:** Durham, Meals: Breakfast
- London-Cambridge-York-Durham
- Start the day leaving London towards northern England.
- Visit Cambridge to admire its beautiful residential colleges.
- Continue to York and its cathedral, Roman walls, and lively shopping streets.

**Day 4:** Edinburgh, Meals: Breakfast
- Durham-Alnwick-Edinburgh
- Travel to Scotland and visit Alnwick, a picturesque town with lovely gardens and a large medieval castle.
- Continue to Edinburgh, arriving at noon, and enjoy a sightseeing tour with a local guide.

**Day 5:** Edinburgh, Meals: Breakfast
- Free day in Edinburgh.

**Day 6:** Inverness, Meals: Breakfast
- Edinburgh-The Kelpies-Stirling-Pitlochry-Culloden-Inverness
- Make a stop to photograph The Kelpies.
- Continue towards Stirling with its impressive historic center dominated by the great castle.
- Visit Pitlochry, a picturesque town in the center of the Scottish region, and a traditional whiskey distillery.

**Day 7:** Inverness, Meals: Breakfast
- Inverness-Eilean Castle-Fort Augustus-Loch Ness-Urquhart Castle-Inverness
- Visit the fascinating Eilean Donan Castle.
- Travel to Fort Augustus and visit the sluice gate system.
- Go on a boat tour on the lake’s dark and mysterious waters of Loch Ness.

**Day 8:** Glasgow, Meals: Breakfast
- Inverness-Fort William-Inveraray-Loch Lomond-Glasgow
- Continue enjoying a stage with gorgeous landscapes.
- Stop in Spean Bridge to visit a monument that speaks about the Second World War.
- Visit Kilchurn Castle, which displays its beautiful ruins right by a dark lake.

**Day 9:** London, Meals: Breakfast
- Glasgow-London
- Departure from Glasgow for London.

**Day 10:** London, Meals: Breakfast
- End of our services.

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare and internal flights as per the itinerary
- Accommodations at the hotels specified above or similar
- All local taxes including services taxes as of 1st Jan, 2024
- Cost of Visa & Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour
- Sightseeing, accommodation & services as per the above-mentioned itinerary
- All transfers and excursions inclusive of entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned van/coach
- Professional services of a friendly and multilingual Tour Manager (Subject to minimum 30 customers) or a local Representative.

**Exclusions:**

- Airfare
- Visa Fees and Travel Insurance
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary.
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list
- Drinks including Water during meals or sightseeing tours are not included
- Surcharges as applicable due to peak season, surcharge dates, trade fair dates, Christmas, New Year week.
- Any personalised tours apart from the ones mentioned
- TCS is not included

**Summary:** Experience the majestic charm of India with the 'Deccan Odyssey - Maharashtra Splendour - Luxury Train' package, a 8-day luxury train journey that explores the rich history and culture of Maharashtra. On board the luxurious train, you'll enjoy breathtaking views, delectable meals, and expertly guided tours to some of India's most iconic sites, including Ellora Caves, Ajanta Caves, and the bustling city of Mumbai.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Mumbai, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus and board the Deccan Odyssey for an unforgettable journey.
- Explore the vibrant city of Mumbai and its stunning architecture.

**Day 2:** Nashik, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Visit the picturesque Nashik, known for its ancient temples and scenic ghats along the Godavari River.
- Enjoy a vineyard tour and wine-tasting experience.

**Day 3:** Aurangabad, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Visit the magnificent Ellora Caves, a World Heritage site, showcasing the spirit of tolerance in ancient India.
- Explore the stunning rock-cut temples and intricate sculptures.

**Day 4:** Jalgaon, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Discover the breathtaking beauty of Ajanta Caves, a UNESCO World Heritage site, featuring exquisite murals and sculptures.
- Marvel at the ancient art and architecture.

**Day 5:** Kolhapur, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Experience the rich history and culture of Kolhapur, a city known for its unique blend of traditions and artistic heritage.
- Visit the N Palace, Mahalaxmi Temple, and Town Hall Museum.

**Day 6:** Goa, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Relax in the picturesque town of Goa, known for its stunning beaches and vibrant culture.
- Explore the historic town, visit the ruins of St. Augustine Church, and experience the local markets.

**Day 7:** Sindhudurg, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Discover the natural beauty of Sindhudurg, a scenic island off the coast of Malvan.
- Enjoy a peaceful day in this tranquil setting.

**Day 8:** Mumbai, Meals: Breakfast
- Return to Mumbai, concluding your journey with unforgettable memories of India's rich history and culture.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in twin bedded cabin with en suite bathrooms
- All meals (B, L, D)
- Soft beverages during the journey
- Valet service
- Still camera fees
- Guided off train excursions and game drives as illustrated in the itinerary, inclusive of entrance fees, park fees, transport, and services of an English speaking local guide

**Exclusions:**

- GST/VAT
- Insurance
- Gratuity
- Laundry and alcoholic beverages
- Video and professional still camera fees
- Arrival and Departure transfers
- International and Domestic air tickets / Visa fee
- Pre and Post tour accommodation and any tour extensions unless specifically mentioned as a part of the journey
- All activities mentioned as 'options' in the itinerary

**Product Terms and Conditions:**

- Tour price is subject to change as per the occupancy on the tour.
- All guests are required to carry their ID Proofs (except Pan Card).
- IDs required: Passport/Voter ID/DL/Aadhar
- The costs are per cabin per journey.
- As the train runs on the tracks of the Indian Railways, the itineraries are subject to change in case of any changes in the routing, etc.
- Prices are subject to change in case of any amendment in the routing or other hikes such as fuel, taxes, etc.
- Children below 5 years of age shall be allowed free, subject to sharing of double bed with parents. This is subject to the availability of double bed while booking.
- Presidential Suite can accommodate up to 3 adults or 2 Adults and 2 children (One child up to 5 years of age and second child up to 12 years of age)

**Summary:** Europamundo is proud to offer the "Europamundo - A Time to Remember" package, a 10-day journey through the beautiful cities of Rome, Florence, Venice, Zurich, and Paris. This incredible tour will take you through stunning landscapes, historic landmarks, and vibrant cities, giving you a true taste of Europe's rich culture and history. Highlights of the tour include visits to the Vatican, the Imperial Forums, St. Peter's Basilica, and the Eiffel Tower, as well as scenic boat cruises along the River Seine and breathtaking views of the Tyrolean sceneries. Enjoy a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the Murano Glass Factory, a cable car ride to Grindelwald First, and a free afternoon to explore as you choose.

**Itinerary:**

Day 1: Rome, Meals: N/A, Description: 
Welcome to Rome! Upon arrival, we will be waiting to transfer you to your hotel. Later, our guide will greet you and provide all the necessary information.

Day 2: Rome, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
In the morning, we have a scenic tour of the city, which will be a great introduction to “The Eternal city.” We will visit the Vatican, the Imperial Forums, and St. Peter’s Basilica.

Day 3: Florence, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
Today we will leave Rome, heading north. This route has beautiful landscapes. Arriving in FLORENCE, we head straight to the impressive Piazzale Michelangelo. In the evening we take a tour with a local expert, walking through the historic center, taking in places such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Plaza della Signoria.

Day 4: Venice, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
Today we enjoy stunning mountain landscapes while crossing the Apennine Mountains. We will arrive in VENICE and take the boat and cross the Giudecca to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we will visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square.

Day 5: Zurich, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
We will depart Venice and head to Austria. Arrival in INNSBRUCK, time to take a stroll in its historic town center and to have lunch. Next, we will continue our journey through the wonderful Tyrolean sceneries as we cross into Switzerland. Arrival in ZURICH.

Day 6: Zurich, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
Today’s journey has beautiful landscapes with high mountains and lakes. Breathtaking scenery in the region of Interlaken. We will stop in GRINDELWALD where we will have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up to mountain.

Day 7: Paris, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
We leave Zurich towards the French region of Alsace to visit its capital STRASBOURG, a charming city that combines French and German influences. Time to get to know the city. After that we continue our route towards PARIS, arriving at the end of the day.

Day 8: Paris, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
We come into contact with the history of France in the immense Palace of Versailles (admission not included) with its beautiful gardens. After that, on our way back to Paris, we head to Montmartre, and take a cable car (included) to go up to this bohemian neighborhood known for its painters, artists and cabarets.

Day 9: Paris, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
We go to the center of Paris, starting by the Eiffel Tower area. You will have the opportunity to go up to the second floor of this remarkable metal monument (ticket included).

Day 10: Paris, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
After breakfast, end of our services.

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare & internal flights as per the itinerary
- Accommodations at the hotels specified above or similar
- All local taxes including services taxes as of 1st Jan, 2024
- Cost of Visa & Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour
- Sightseeing, accommodation & services as per the above-mentioned itinerary
- All transfers and excursions inclusive of entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned van/coach
- Professional services of a friendly and multilingual Tour Manager (Subject to minimum 30 customers) or a local Representative.

**Exclusions:**

- Airfare
- Visa Fees and Travel Insurance
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary.
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list
- Drinks including Water during meals or sightseeing tours are not included
- Surcharges as applicable due to peak season, surcharge dates, trade fair dates, Christmas, New Year week.
- Any personalised tours apart from the ones mentioned
- TCS is not included.

**Summary:** The 'Awe-Inspiring Nepal' package is a 6-day tour that covers the beautiful cities of Kathmandu and Pokhara in Nepal. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath, and Nagarkot, as well as a scenic drive to Pokhara and a sightseeing tour of the city's attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, panoramic views of the Himalayas, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to Sarangkot and a scenic drive to Nagarkot.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Kathmandu, Meals: N/A, Description: Meeting at airport upon arrival by Office Personnel. Transfer to hotel. Kathmandu is the capital of Nepal and the Kathmandu Valley is the political and cultural heart of the Kingdom.

**Day 2:** Kathmandu, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Visit Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath, and Patan. 

**Day 3:** Pokhara, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Drive to Pokhara. Pokhara is 210 kms from Kathmandu and is a 7 hours drive approx. From Pokhara town (2,352 feet) in good weather there are splendid views right from the hotel. 

**Day 4:** Pokhara, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Visit Sarangkot, Bindebasini Temple, Devi’s fall, and Gupteshwor Cave.

**Day 5:** Nagarkot, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Drive back to Kathmandu. Continue drive to Nagarkot. Nagarkot is situated 32 kilometers, 1.5 HRS drive east of Kathmandu at an altitude of 2,175 meters.

**Day 6:** Nagarkot, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Drive straight to the airport which is 1.5 hours drive approx to board flight for onward journey.

**Inclusions:**

- 02 nights accommodation in Kathmandu with Breakfast.
- 02 nights accommodation in Pokhara with Breakfast.
- 01 night accommodation in Nagarkot with Breakfast.
- 02 airport transfers by an A/c vehicle exclusively
- Sightseeing as per the itinerary in Kathmandu and Pokhara by an a/c vehicle exclusively
- Transportation Kathmandu / Pokhara / Nagarkot / Kathmandu by an A/c vehicle exclusively
- Presently applicable hotel taxes.

**Exclusions:**

- Services other than specified.
- Entrance fee at the monumental sites during the sightseeing.
- Guide during the sightseeing.
- Any expenses of personal nature such as drinks, laundry, telephone/fax calls.
- Any expenses caused by reasons beyond our control such as flight delays, rescheduling or cancellations, any accidents, medical evacuations, riots, strikes, etc.
- Any tips to drivers, hotel staff, any meals apart from the ones mentioned above.
- Any other tax or service charge that could be enforced during this period will be extra & need to borne by you.

**Summary:** The 'Maldives - The Residence at Falhumaafushi' package is a 5-day tour that offers a relaxing and rejuvenating experience in the beautiful Maldives. The itinerary includes 4 nights' accommodation in a Beach Villa (No Pool) or Beach Villa with Pool, with all-inclusive meals and return domestic flight + speedboat transfers. The package also includes a 90-minute sunset dolphin cruise and honeymoon freebies such as a bottle of wine, a romantic in-villa bath set-up, and 15% discount off Ala Carte Treatment at The Spa by Clarins. The price is INR 132,725.00.

**Itinerary:**

* Day 1: Arrive in Male and check-in at the hotel
* Day 2-5: Enjoy your day at leisure, explore the island on your own
* Day 5: Departure from Male

**Room Category:**

* Beach Villa (No Pool)
* Beach Villa with Pool

**Meal Plan:**

* All Inclusive

**Single, Double, Triple:**

* NA, 1527, NA

**Inclusions:**

* 04 Night’s accommodation in Beach Villa (No Pool)
* Meal Plan as per selection – All Inclusive
* Return Domestic Flight + Speedboat transfers
* Green Tax
* Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Complimentary:**

* Free Upgrade Beach Villa (No Pool) to Water Villa (No Pool) based on Subject to availability
* Free Upgrade Beach Villa with Pool to Water Villa with Pool based on Subject to availability
* 1 time 90 mins Sunset Dolphin Cruise per person per stay

**Honeymoon Freebies:**

* A bottle of wine on arrival
* A romantic in-villa bath set-up (once during stay)
* Enjoy 15% discount off Ala Carte Treatment at The Spa by Clarins

**Exclusions:**

* TCS & GST
* International Airfare & Visa Charges
* Guaranteed early check in or late check-out
* Any expenses of personal nature
* Tips and porterage
* Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary.
* Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included
* RT-PCR Test
* Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list

**Important Note:**

* Child above 10 yrs is considered as an Adult
* Once the booking is confirmed, it falls under 100% cancellation
* If client reports turns out to be covid positive, then date change is possible but travel has to be before 31st Jan, 2021.

**Summary:**
The 'Discover Riyadh' package is a 4-day tour that takes you through the vibrant city of Riyadh, the capital of Saudi Arabia. This exciting tour includes visits to historic sites such as Ushaiqer, which is one of the oldest towns in Saudi Arabia and a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Enjoy a full day tour of the Ushaiqer, where you can roam its narrow alleyways, visit a private collection of old antiques, and have an authentic Arabian picnic experience in the dunes or at a traditional restaurant. The itinerary also includes a half-day city tour of Riyadh, where you can visit the traditional Dirah Souq, Masmak Fort, and Ad-Diriyah, the birthplace of the first Saudi Kingdom.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Riyadh, Meals: N/A
- Arrival in Riyadh and transfer to the hotel.
- Free time for leisure and exploration.

**Day 2:** Riyadh, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
- Full Day Ushaiqer Tour With Lunch (SIC Basis)
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Visit Ushaiqer, one of the oldest towns in Saudi Arabia.
- Explore its narrow alleyways, visit a private collection of old antiques, and have an Arabian picnic experience.

**Day 3:** Riyadh, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
- Half Day City Tour Of Riyadh (SIC Basis)
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Visit the traditional Dirah Souq, Masmak Fort, and Ad-Diriyah, the birthplace of the first Saudi Kingdom.

**Day 4:** Riyadh, Meals: Breakfast
- Departure from Riyadh.
- Breakfast at the hotel.

**Inclusions:**

- 03 nights’ accommodation in Riyadh as per selection.
- Daily breakfast except on day 1.
- Meals as mentioned in the itinerary.
- Airport transfers on PVT basis.
- All sightseeing and entrance fees as per the itinerary.
- All taxes.
- Travel Insurance (Valid till the age of 59 Yrs.).

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST.
- Visa charges.
- Departure PCR test, if applicable.
- All flights services.
- Meals not mentioned in the itinerary.
- Any tips (Around USD 05.00 per person / per day) - for guide & Driver.
- Anything not mentioned in the inclusions.
- Pre & Post tour services & cost.
- Expenditure of a personal nature (Such as uses of Mini – Bar & Refrigerator, laundry service, telephone call, camera fee, tips & Etc).
- All drink and beverages.
- Hotel promotional rates not valid during Black out Period / Surcharge Dates / Stop Sales on Hotel.

- The package price is valid until 30th Sep 2023.
- The upgrade hotel prices are subject to availability at the time of booking.
